summary: V23 BOM Grid Update - All features verified working: Lifecycle Stage column, KPI Analytics Bar, Column Sorting, Data Source Legend, AML column, New Part badges, PLM/ERP icons, Tree expand/collapse
passed_tests: Dashboard loads correctly with KPI cards (72% Progress, 8 Blockers, 4 At Risk, 5 Orderable)
Navigation from Dashboard to BOM Grid works (Open BOM Grid button)
Navigation from BOM Grid to Dashboard works (← Dashboard button)
KPI Analytics Bar shows 4 metrics: Not Yet in ERP (29%), Pending COs (3), Not Orderable (43%), Clear-to-Build (2026-03-15 +5 days late)
Data Source Legend shows PLM (Read Only), ERP (Read Only), and Editable (Pre-CO) indicators
Lifecycle Stage column displays in grid header and data rows
All 6 lifecycle stages present: Draft, Ready for CO, CO Submitted, CO Approved, CCO In Progress, Orderable
Lifecycle stage badges have proper color coding (green for Orderable, purple for CCO In Progress, blue for CO Approved, orange for CO Submitted, cyan for Ready for CO, gray for Draft)
AML column displays with color-coded badges (0=red, 1-2=amber, 3=green, 4+=emerald) - Found 29 badges
New Part badges display on newly added parts (green 'New' badge) - Found 8 new badges
PLM/ERP database icons appear next to relevant fields (21 icons total: 14 purple PLM, 7 indigo ERP)
Column sorting works - clicking headers sorts ascending/descending
Sort indicators (arrows) appear on column headers when sorted
Tree expand/collapse functionality works correctly
Items start collapsed by default (only Level 0 visible)
Multi-level expand works (Level 0 -> Level 1 -> Level 2)
Lifecycle Stage filter in Filters panel works (can filter by Orderable, Draft, etc.)
Draft items have special styling (orange highlight, amber border)
14 total items shown as expected
Role toggle (Engineering, Procurement, PM) switches column visibility correctly
All items have proper PLM item numbers (no TEMP-xxx prefixes)

success_rate.backend: N/A - frontend only test (static seed data from bomData.js)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing V23 bomData.js with lifecycleStage, aml, isNewPart fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: V23 BOM Grid update complete and verified. All new features working: 1) Lifecycle Stage column with 6 stages, 2) KPI Analytics bar with 4 metrics, 3) Column sorting on all headers, 4) Data Source legend (PLM/ERP/Editable), 5) AML column with color-coded badges, 6) New Part badges, 7) PLM/ERP database icons. Pre-CO workspace concept removed - all items come from PLM with Lifecycle Stage instead.
mocked_api_note: Backend serves static seed data from bomData.js via /api/bom endpoint - MOCKED
